creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text: FWIW on current head I don't see this behavior.  What I see instead is that we create the zvol with default mode, but don't destroy and recreate it.  So it ends up with the wrong mode.  Only if I subsequently do "zfs set volmode=dev <volname>" does the zvol get the correct mode.  I opened bug 251828 for that.
